query: Suno AI June 2026 platform changes licensed models download policy free tier paid accounts official announcement
a_issues: Content A lacks a clear official source stating the June 2026 platform changes. Its strongest relevant result is a Digital Music News article summarizing planned 2026 policy changes, but it does not directly provide the official announcement language about downloads requiring a paid account and paid users having monthly caps. reasoning: Content B better enables a correct answer because it contains the key facts from an official announcement source: the Warner Music Group press release explicitly says that in 2026 Suno will launch new, more advanced and licensed models; downloading audio will require a paid account; and paid tier users will have limited monthly download caps with the option to pay for more. Those are exactly the facts asked about. Content A has partial corroboration from Digital Music News, but its result set is dominated by unofficial and potentially contradictory sources, and it does not surface the official announcement directly. Therefore B is more reliable and complete for answering the question correctly.
